mapper.select: SELECT p.GURU_PORTFOLIOS_ID AS id , p.GURU_ID , g.INVESTOR_NM , g.INVESTOR_KO_NM , g.INVESTOR_NICKNAME , g.INVEST_PHILOSOPHY , g.FAMOUS_QUOTE , p.ISSUER_NM , p.TICKER , p.RANK_NO , p.PORTFOLIO_PCT , p.REPORT_DATE , p.REG_DT FROM tbl_guru_portfolios p JOIN tbl_guru g ON g.GURU_ID = p.GURU_ID WHERE p.GURU_PORTFOLIOS_ID = #{id}
